title: PHP Namespaces
codeExample:
<?php
// File: App/Helpers/MathHelper.php
namespace App\Helpers;

class MathHelper {
    public static function add($a, $b) {
        return $a + $b;
    }
}

// File: index.php
require_once "App/Helpers/MathHelper.php";

use App\Helpers\MathHelper;
use App\Helpers\MathHelper as Helper;

// Using imported class
echo MathHelper::add(5, 3); // 8

// Using alias
echo Helper::add(10, 20); // 30

// Fully qualified
echo \App\Helpers\MathHelper::add(1, 2); // 3

// Global namespace
$dt = new \DateTime("now");
echo $dt->format("Y-m-d");
?>

quiz.question: Which keyword imports a class from another namespace?
